'''Jakan''' was the [[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] of the [[Priest caste]] and one of the highest members of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Elite (Yuuzhan Vong)|Elite]].

==Biography==
Even before the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] began, Jakan was a senior religious advisor to [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]]. The father of [[Elan]], her death hardened his religious orthodoxy, and he consistently urged Shimrra to eliminate the [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' heresy]] before it gained strength (including a recommendation to send wild [[spineray]]s into the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]]). Though he expected to lead many glorious sacrifices for the [[Yun'o|Gods]] on [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]], the Priest caste was humiliated repeatedly by the sabotages the [[World Brain]] caused. During the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], Jakan, along with [[High Prefect]] [[Drathul]] and [[Master Shaper]] [[Qelah Kwaad]], attempted to sacrifice [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], and [[Harrar]] to the World Brain, but was stopped by a group of heretics and renegade [[Warrior caste|Warriors]].

Jakan was one of the Yuuzhan Vong who went to the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]].
